response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript and cloud-related work, including recent involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, which aligns well with the role's requirements. However, his lack of explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks, combined with minimal direct mention of GenAI systems, raises concerns about his immediate fit. His diverse background and adaptability could bridge gaps if given the opportunity.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with TypeScript and Node.js, including recent AI-agent infrastructure work
Proven leadership in technical discovery and mentorship through workshops and open-source contributions
Diverse experience with cloud platforms (AWS CDK) and scalable systems handling high-throughput data
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks in resume
Limited direct experience with GenAI systems or production-grade AI workflows
Education focuses on general computer science rather than specialized AI/ML fields
